name: Quassus
description: Flick away the enemy with this heavy warfan. The Quassus scatters ethereal daggers that are even more deadly accurate when wielded by Xaku.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Flick away the enemy with this heavy warfan. The Quassus scatters ethereal daggers that are even more deadly accurate when wielded by Xaku.

components.name: Devolved Namalon
components.description:
Retrieved from its Infested state, restored to worth and utility.

Blueprint sold by Otak in the Necralisk on Deimos.

components.name: Scintillant
components.description:
These scarce, hovering relics of the Orokin era can still be found monitoring the isolation vaults deep beneath the surface of Deimos.

Location: Cambion Drift on Deimos

components.name: Seriglass Shard
components.description:
Once part of an intricate Entrati apparatus, now shattered and bearing a sharp edge.

Location: Grandmother in the Necralisk on Deimos

components.name: Spinal Core Section
components.description:
Many delicate and complex nerve fibers are housed in the jointed vertebrae, which are one of the creature's most resilient parts. Found from Vitreospina fish known to eke out a primitive existence in cave systems.

Source: Cut from Vitreospina and Chondricord fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch Vitreospina in Cambion Drift caves during Fass and Vome, and Chondricord in Cambion Drift cave hotspots during Fass and Vome. Also drops from Isolation Vault Bounties and Sagiant Entrati Caskets in the Cambion Drift.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Quassus and Gunsen gaining different Melee combo counters on first hit with the Slicing Feathers Stance. They will both have the same 3 combo counter hits now.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: TennoGen: 29.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Quassus leaving you "unarmed" after using heavy attacks.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash when inspecting the Quassus’ stats in the Mission Progress screen while in the Cambion Drift.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.fixes: *Find the Quassus in the Market or the Blueprint in Entrati Bounties.
